intro: 6 easy problems that drill the Queue / BFS pattern — ideal for focused practice sessions.

faqs.question: Why practice easy Queue / BFS problems?
faqs.answer: Difficulty-scoped drills lock the pattern before you mix constraints on harder variants.

seo.title: Easy Queue / BFS Problems | AlgoForge
